title: ACEF Transparency Disclosure Payload
description: Payload schema for transparency_disclosure records. Captures public-facing documentation and instructions for use per EU AI Act Art. 13, GPAI requirements, China CAC visible labels, and UK statutory transparency. Supports the publication_evidence variant via the variant discriminator field.

variant.description: Discriminator for payload variants. Use 'publication_evidence' for evidence that a transparency document was publicly published.

intended_use.description: Intended use of the AI system as described in the disclosure.

prohibited_uses.description: Prohibited uses of the AI system.

risk_warnings.description: Risk warnings included in the disclosure.

interpretation_guidance.description: Guidance on how to interpret system outputs.

explanation_methods.description: Explanation methods available for system outputs.

confidence_indicators.description: How confidence or uncertainty is communicated in system outputs.

known_failure_modes.description: Known failure modes described in the disclosure.

out_of_scope_uses.description: Uses that are out of scope for the AI system.

api_documentation_ref.description: Reference to API documentation (for integration guidance).

rate_limits.description: API rate limit information (for integration guidance).

summary_published.description: Whether the summary has been publicly published (for publication_evidence variant).

publication_url.description: URL where the disclosure is published (for publication_evidence variant).

publication_content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the published content for verifiability (for publication_evidence variant).

reporting_period.description: Reporting period covered by the disclosure (for transparency reports).
